question: When does patient 65582 come into the exc/dest intvrt disc nos process?
prompt_sent: When does patient 65582 come into the exc/dest intvrt disc nos process? Set the current time to be "2100-12-31 23:59:00" when using m3 mcp.
final_text: I ran a quick search through the MIMIC‑IV tables (patients, admissions, icustays) to locate any record with `subject_id = 65582`. No match was found in any of those tables, so there is no entry for that patient ID in the current database snapshot. Consequently, I cannot determine when that patient would enter the “exc/dest intvrt disc nos” process because the patient simply isn’t present in the data set you’re querying.
